title: rubus decurrens
intro: Rubus decurrens, also known as the running raspberry or creeping raspberry, is a perennial plant in the rose family native to the Pacific coast of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus decurrens include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and aid in the treatment of digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
